system.description:
Market Maker is the Influencer discipline for runners who treat attention as a monetary instrument. Practitioners do not lead movements so much as price them. They came up in lifestyle commerce, brand consultancy, and the secondary markets where attention metrics are traded as a commodity. They know exactly how much a single endorsement moves the needle and exactly which needles matter on a given week.

On the job, the Market Maker Influencer is the runner who bends commercial reality. Their entry feature is Trend Trade: once per session the Influencer may declare a brand, product, or location as suddenly important to their audience, generating tangible local effects: crowds, supply scarcity, hostile attention, or a needed distraction at the venue of choice.
system.grants: Trend Trade: once per session, drive a target brand/product/location into sudden relevance with tangible effects.

wizard.tagline: Turn attention into leverage and leverage into outcomes
